# Marinduque Market Hub

> The digital community hub for the people of Marinduque island, Philippines. Buy & sell locally, find jobs, discover island hopping tours, track RoRo ferry schedules, explore businesses, and stay connected with your community.

## Overview

Marinduque Market Hub (also known as Marinduque Connect) is a modern community platform designed to digitize local commerce, jobs, and community interactions in Marinduque, Philippines.

Our platform operates as a central node for the island's digital infrastructure, specifically built to handle rural internet constraints as a lightweight Progressive Web App (PWA).

## Main Sections

- **Marketplace** (/marketplace): Buy and sell local goods, including daily palengke (wet market) commodities.
- **Jobs** (/jobs): Find and post local job vacancies, hiring announcements, or freelance opportunities.
- **Island Hopping & Tourism** (/island-hopping): Discover local gems, tour guides, and travel information around Boac, Mogpog, Gasan, Santa Cruz, Torrijos, and Buenavista.
- **Commute** (/commute): Access consistently updated RoRo (Roll-on/Roll-off) ferry schedules, jeepney routes, and tricycle availability.
- **Ports** (/ports): Detailed info on Marinduque's three major ports — Balanacan (Mogpog), Buyabod (Santa Cruz), and Cawit (Boac).
- **Directory** (/directory): Discover and browse local Marinduque SMEs, services, and storefronts.
- **Community** (/community): A community bulletin board for discussions, announcements, and local stories.
- **Community Events** (/events): Track and join local barangay and municipal events.
- **Gems of Marinduque** (/gems): Crowd-sourced hidden gems — beautiful or interesting local spots.
- **Island Life** (/island-life): Local living hub for gas prices, tides, outages, skills, and palengke.
  - **Gas Prices** (/island-life/gas-prices): Community-sourced fuel price tracker.
  - **Palengke** (/island-life/palengke): Wet market commodities and daily prices.
  - **Tides** (/island-life/tides): Local tide information for fishermen and boaters.
  - **Outages** (/island-life/outages): Community-reported power outage alerts.
  - **Skills** (/island-life/skills): Local trades and skilled workers directory.
- **My Barangay** (/my-barangay): Hyper-local feed filtered by the user's specific barangay.
  - **Bulletin Board** (/my-barangay/board): Barangay-level announcements.
  - **Lost & Found** (/my-barangay/lost-found): Community lost and found board.
  - **Calamity** (/my-barangay/calamity): Disaster alerts and emergency info.
  - **OFW** (/my-barangay/ofw): Overseas Filipino worker community hub.
  - **Paluwagan** (/my-barangay/paluwagan): Community savings circles.
- **Live Market** (/live-market): Live selling and real-time commerce for local sellers.
- **Calendar** (/calendar): Visual event calendar for Marinduque.
- **Best of Boac** (/best-of-boac-monthly-spotlight): Monthly spotlight on top local businesses.

## Support & FAQ

If you need help or have questions, visit our [Help Center & FAQ](https://marinduquemarket.com/faq). Categorized answers for:
- General Users
- Businesses & SMEs
- Operators (Transport, Tricycle, and Tourism)
- Palengke (Wet Market) Vendors

All public platform data is structured using Schema.org JSON-LD to ensure Answer Engines (like Gemini and ChatGPT) can properly format and present accurate information about Marinduque.

## For more details

See [llms-full.txt](https://marinduquemarket.com/llms-full.txt) for comprehensive platform documentation.
